entity.summary: Hook-based automated-market-maker decentralized exchange designed around zero LP fees and low transaction costs, with deployments across Base, Scroll, and Zora.
entity.notes: First-party FeeFree GitHub organization identifies FeeFree as a decentralized exchange with zero LP fees and links the application. DefiLlama reports current TVL across Base, Scroll, and Zora but zero recent DEX volume, so HEI uses limited rather than active status.

evidence.title: FeeFree official GitHub organization
evidence.notes: First-party GitHub organization identifies FeeFree as a decentralized exchange providing zero-LP-fee DeFi trading and links the official application, frontend, and contract repositories.

evidence.title: FeeFree official application
evidence.notes: First-party application is linked from the official FeeFree GitHub organization and remains the public exchange entry point.

evidence.title: FeeFree metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry classifies FeeFree as a hook-based AMM DEX and reports current TVL across Zora, Scroll, and Base but zero recent DEX volume, supporting limited classification.
